rationale.R1.6: The agent improved the writing by removing redundant hedging and sharpening claims, but some areas could still be clearer.
rationale.RX.1: While the agent reduced excessive hedging, it did not explicitly mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced.
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not annotate changes with sources or reasons.
